arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool star negotiating last-minute offer that could turn the Premier League upside down
arts.sum: Liverpool’s sensational campaign continues to dominate headlines, with Arne Slot’s side sitting comfortably at the top of the Premier League table, holding a seven-point lead over second-placed Arsenal. As the Reds chase glory on multiple fronts, securing the long-term future of their key players remains an unresolved issue with the contracts of Mo Salah, Virgil […] The post Report: Liverpool star negotiating last-minute offer that could turn the Premier League upside down appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Everton's new stadium toasted with brutal Liverpool gesture after first ever goal
arts.sum: Everton hosted the first-ever game in their brand new Bramley Moore Dock Stadium but things did not quite go to plan as their rivals got the last laugh less than a week after the Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: 'Incredible': Jack Grealish says Liverpool have a player who is an absolutely amazing playmaker
Liverpool handed FA punishment hint after Arsenal outcome confirmed
arts.sum: Everton, Liverpool, Arne Slot and Sipke Hulshoff have all been charged by the FA

arts.ttl: First new Everton Stadium goalscorer busts out Liverpool celebration to mark history making moment
arts.sum: The Toffees' Under 18s are playing Wigan Athletic in a test event for the new ground at Bramley-Moore Dock

arts.ttl: Not even Arsene Wenger believes Arsenal can beat Liverpool to Premier League title
arts.sum: Legendary Arsenal manager Arsene Wenger has admitted he expects Liverpool to win the Premier League this season

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk fires pressure warning to Liverpool over Premier League title race
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk discusses the pressure facing Liverpool in the Premier League title race.
